---
title: "StackOverflow Stats"
subtitle: "Some activity stats from StackOverflow of selected tags"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import plotly.graph_objects as go

from _motherduck import connect

con = connect()

question_stats = con.sql("""
    select
        status
        , total_questions
        , round(avg_score, 3) as avg_score
    from personal.question_stats
""").df()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
colors = ["#5470C6", "#91CC75"]

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_bar(
    x=question_stats["status"],
    y=question_stats["total_questions"],
    name="Total Questions",
    marker_color=colors[0],
    yaxis="y1",
)
fig.add_scatter(
    x=question_stats["status"],
    y=question_stats["avg_score"],
    name="Avg. Score",
    marker_color=colors[1],
    yaxis="y2",
)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Question Stats",
    yaxis=dict(title="Total Questions", ticksuffix=" questions"),
    yaxis2=dict(title="Avg. Score", ticksuffix=" points", overlaying="y", side="right"),
    legend=dict(orientation="h"),
)
fig.show()
```
